message:
feat(vc_tui): add accounts, sessions, and mail screens + update gitignore

**New TUI Screens:**

accounts.rs (411 lines):
- Displays caut/caam account usage and rate limit status
- Table view with provider, status, usage%, rate limits
- Sortable columns (name, provider, usage, status)
- Filter support for searching accounts
- Health indicators (green/yellow/red)

sessions.rs (534 lines):
- Shows active agent sessions from caut collector
- Group by: machine, agent, status
- Session details: duration, model, tokens, tools used
- Real-time activity indicators

mail.rs (592 lines):
- Agent Mail inbox/thread viewer
- Three-pane layout: threads, messages, detail
- Unread indicators, importance badges
- Reply/acknowledge actions

**Updated .gitignore:**
- /target-*/ - Rust build directories with color names
- /tests/logs/*.{err,out,json} - Test output logs
- IDE files (.idea/, .vscode/, *.swp)
- OS files (.DS_Store, Thumbs.db)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +1,22 @@
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# Rust build directories (standard and colored variants)
+/target/
+/target-*/
+
+# Test output logs (ephemeral)
+/tests/logs/*.err
+/tests/logs/*.out
+/tests/logs/*.json
+/tests/logs/summary.json
+
+# IDE and editor
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+*.swp
+*~
+
+# OS files
+.DS_Store
+Thumbs.db
